post.description: Refresh leads for a tenant. Can be called at any time to update the lead list.

get.description:
Get kanban pipeline view for tenant leads.

Returns columns grouped by stage with lead cards.
By default, snoozed and hidden leads are excluded.

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search by lead name or address
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search by lead name or address

get.description:
Get detailed view of a tenant lead.

Includes all lead data, contacts, addresses, signals, scores, and current stage.

post.description:
Assign lead to a tenant member.

Member must belong to the same tenant.
Pass null member_id to unassign.

Add a note to a tenant lead.

Note is attributed to the current user.

get.description:
List all notes for a tenant lead.

Ordered by creation date (newest first).

post.description:
Create a task for a tenant lead.

Task is attributed to the current user.

get.description:
List all tasks for a tenant lead.

Ordered by due date (soonest first), then creation date.

patch.description:
Update a task.

Can update title, description, status, and due date.
Setting status to COMPLETED automatically sets completed_at.

post.description:
Snooze a lead until specified datetime.

Lead will move to SNOOZED stage and be hidden from board until snoozed_until time.

Hide a lead.

Lead will move to HIDDEN stage and be excluded from board by default.
Can be restored by moving to NEW stage.

Отправляет задачу в очередь Celery и немедленно возвращает task_id.
Результат можно забрать позже через GET /{lead_id}/profile.

Выполняет граф обогащения прямо в запросе и возвращает результат.
Удобно для ручного тестирования. Таймаут запроса ~30 сек.

Отправляет одну Celery-задачу, которая последовательно обрабатывает
все переданные lead_ids.

get.description:
Возвращает последний сохранённый LeadLegalProfile для лида,
или null если обогащение ещё не запускалось.

delete.description:
Revoke a queued or running task.
- If the task is queued but not started, it will not be executed.
- terminate=true sends SIGTERM to the worker process running the task.
